title: K-200 GCS Maintenance Procedure
text:
# K-200 GCS Maintenance Procedure

Document number: MD-DOC-438-D. Revision: D. Type: manual. Author: Tyler Moss. Created: 2023-09-07. Last modified: 2024-08-23. Status: Released.

This document defines the requirements, interfaces, and verification approach for the GCS subsystem of the Kestrel K-200. Referenced parts: P-1106, P-1158.
